designSystemName: Warm Minimal Food & Beverage App UI

meta.appCategory: Food & Beverage / E-commerce (coffee shop ordering app)
meta.referenceNote: Extracted structurally from a multi-screen mobile app case-study mockup. Content (brand name, copy, product names) intentionally excluded — use this as a reusable style/structure template, not a content template.

primary.usage: Primary brand color. Used for backgrounds of cover/intro panels, primary CTA buttons, icon accents, active tab/segment highlights, promo tags.

accent.usage: Used sparingly for promo/sale badges and urgency tags only.

colorRules: One dominant warm accent color (terracotta) carries brand identity across all screens.
Dark near-black backgrounds are used for immersive/hero product photography screens.
Light/white backgrounds are used for functional/transactional screens (browse, cart, checkout).
Avoid more than 2 accent colors total; red/orange reserved strictly for promotional badges.

typography.fontStyle: Rounded geometric sans-serif (e.g. similar to 'SF Pro Rounded', 'Poppins', or 'Circular')
hierarchyRules: Headings are bold, tight line-height, left-aligned.
Supporting/description text is regular weight, lower contrast gray, short (1-2 lines max).
Prices and key numeric data are bold and same color as headings for emphasis.

layoutAndStructure.gridSystem: Single-column mobile layout, 16-20px horizontal margins, consistent 12-16px vertical rhythm between stacked elements.
layoutAndStructure.elevation: Soft, subtle drop shadows on white cards floating over light gray backgrounds; no shadows on dark hero screens.

screenTypes.structure: Full-bleed brand-color background, logo badge + wordmark top-left, large bold headline, one-line subtitle, vertical list of 3 feature bullets each with a circular icon badge, small tool/platform icons at bottom.

Full-bleed dark hero photo background (steam/product close-up), status bar visible, bottom third contains: bold 3-line headline over a soft gradient/overlay, one-line supporting text, full-width rounded primary button, small pagination dots below.
Light background, top nav bar with back icon + centered title, segmented control (2 pill tabs e.g. toggle A/B) directly below nav, list content below segmented control.

Light background, top summary/total row, payment method selector row (icon + label + chevron, right-aligned value), full-width primary rounded button pinned near bottom, small handle/indicator bar at very bottom for home gesture.

Dark or light top status/header area with location label + dropdown chevron, search bar (rounded, icon-left) with adjacent circular filter icon button, promo banner card (rounded, colored background, badge tag + bold text + product image), horizontal scrollable category pill tabs (one active/filled state, rest outline/muted), grid of product cards (2 columns) each with image, rating badge, title, subtitle, price, and circular add(+) button, bottom tab bar with 4-5 icons and one filled/active state.

iconButton.fill: white or terracotta depending on context

iconBadge.fill: translucent white on brand-color background, or white on dark background

promoTag.usage: top-left corner overlay on promo banners

ratingBadge.position: top-left corner overlay on product image

productCard.structure: image (rounded top corners, ~1:1 ratio) > title (bold) > subtitle (muted, small) > price (bold, left) + circular add button (right)

promoBanner.structure: rounded card, colored/photo background, promo tag top-left, bold short headline overlaid, product image bleeding off right edge

topBar.structure: back chevron (left) + centered title (bold) OR location label + dropdown (left) + notification/filter icon (right)

bottomTabBar.structure: 4-5 icon-only tabs, evenly spaced, one active tab shown as filled circular highlight in brand color, rest muted gray outline icons
bottomTabBar.cornerRadius: top corners rounded if floating, else full-width flat

segmentedControl.structure: two or more pill-shaped tabs inside a rounded outer container, active tab filled with brand color + white text, inactive tabs transparent with muted text

categoryPills.structure: horizontally scrollable row of pill buttons, active = filled brand color + white text, inactive = outline or light-gray fill + dark text

imageryStyle.photography: High-contrast, moody, close-up product photography (steam, texture, rich warm tones) used only on hero/intro screens.
imageryStyle.productThumbnails: Bright, clean, top-down or 3/4 angle shots on neutral/white backgrounds for catalog/grid screens.
imageryStyle.iconography: Thin-line, single-weight, minimal icons; consistently sized within circular badge containers.

motionAndInteractionNotes.activeStates: Filled/solid = active or selected; outline/muted = inactive. Consistent across pills, tabs, and nav.
motionAndInteractionNotes.emphasisPattern: Only one primary action per screen is styled as a solid full-width button; secondary actions are icon-only or text links.

designPrinciplesForReplication: Pick exactly one warm accent color and one neutral dark color; do not introduce additional hues except a single reserved promo/alert color.
Alternate dark immersive screens (marketing/onboarding) with light functional screens (browse/checkout) to create rhythm.
Keep corner radii large and consistent across buttons, cards, and screen frames to reinforce a soft, friendly brand feel.
Use circular icon containers everywhere an icon appears standalone (badges, nav icons, add buttons) rather than square icons.
Typography stays restrained: one font family, bold for headings/prices, regular+muted-gray for secondary text.
Every list/grid follows image > title > muted subtitle > price+action pattern for scannability.
Bottom navigation and top navigation are minimal, icon-first, with exactly one clear active-state indicator.
